summary: Comprehensive testing of incoming supply from shortage feature (iteration 57). All 12 backend tests passed covering: supply creation from shortage, shortage calculation (qty_needed - qty_available), duplicate prevention (409), zero shortage rejection, non-existent SO (422), 'planned' status included in derive_balances, available formula verification. Frontend tests confirmed BC Sales Order panel with preflight functionality, line table rendering, and inventory status display. Truck icon button correctly does NOT appear when no inventory workspace matches the customer.

issues: React hydration warnings about HTML nesting (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/incoming-supply/from-shortage - create supply from shortage (seed 100, commit 400, call endpoint, verify supply created with status 'planned')
Backend: POST /api/incoming-supply/from-shortage - verify shortage calculation (qty_needed - qty_available = 4000 - 1000 = 3000)
Backend: POST /api/incoming-supply/from-shortage - duplicate prevention returns HTTP 409 on second call
Backend: POST /api/incoming-supply/from-shortage - zero shortage rejected when qty_needed <= qty_available
Backend: POST /api/incoming-supply/from-shortage - non-existent SO returns HTTP 422 with 'no order_commitment found'
Backend: derive_balances - 'planned' status incoming supply included in available calculation (incoming goes from 0 to 3000)
Backend: derive_balances - available = on_hand + incoming - committed verified (500 + 1500 - 2000 = 0)
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - partial release still works (committed 100→70, available 0→30)
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - over-release still returns 422 with 'exceeds' message
REGRESSION: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight - endpoint responds (tested with doc_id)
Frontend: Login with admin/admin works correctly
Frontend: Navigate to Inventory Ledger page shows workspace cards (Hormel Foods, Karlin Foods, etc.)
Frontend: Hormel Foods workspace shows balances with SHORT items (SPAM-LITE=-799, TEST-ITEM-WARN=-5000)
Frontend: Balance table shows all required columns (ITEM, WAREHOUSE, OWNERSHIP, ON HAND, INCOMING, COMMITTED, AVAILABLE, UOM, STATUS)
Frontend: Sales_Order document shows BC Sales Order panel with preflight functionality
Frontend: Preflight shows Document Summary, Validation Checklist, Customer Inventory sections
Frontend: Line table displays with inventory status cells (— when no match)
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in multiple components (InventoryLedgerPage, SalesDashboardPage, CreateBCSalesOrderPanel) - these are caused by dynamic rendering inside tables with span wrappers. Low priority but should be addressed for clean console output.
seed_data_used: Each test creates unique items with UUID prefixes to avoid cross-test interference. Test workspaces created per test class with deactivation on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Incoming supply from shortage feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/incoming-supply/from-shortage creates supply records with status='planned' and source_reference=sales_order_id. Shortage = qty_needed - qty_available. Duplicate prevention returns 409. Zero shortage rejected. derive_balances now includes 'planned' status in incoming calculation (status in ['planned', 'expected', 'in_transit']). Frontend: TruckIcon button in CreateBCSalesOrderPanel.js only appears when invStatus is SHORT/LOW AND inv.matched=true AND itemKey (lineObjectNumber) is non-empty. To see truck buttons, need a document where: 1) customer matches an inventory workspace, 2) SO has commitments creating SHORT items. Existing Hormel Foods workspace has SHORT items (SPAM-LITE=-799).

backend.supply_status: created with status='planned' for derive_balances inclusion
backend.duplicate_prevention: 409 if same item+source_reference exists with status not in ['cancelled', 'received']
backend.validation: 422 if no order_commitment found or shortage <= 0
backend.balance_formula: available = on_hand + incoming - committed (planned supply now included in incoming)

frontend.truck_icon_button: data-testid='so-line-{i}-create-supply-btn' on SHORT/LOW lines when inv.matched && itemKey
frontend.callback: handleCreateShortageSupply calls createIncomingFromShortage API then re-runs preflight
frontend.preflight_panel: Shows inventory workspace match status, line table with inventory columns
frontend.inventory_ledger: Workspaces, balances, movements, incoming tabs all functional
